<!--
Thanks for the PR! Please fill out the sections below.
The lighter the description, the slower the review — and vice versa.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what does this PR do? -->

## Why

<!-- Link the issue this PR addresses, e.g. "Closes #123".
     If there's no issue, briefly justify the change. -->

## How

<!-- What approach did you take, and why this approach over alternatives?
     If the PR touches more than one file, give the reader a tour. -->

## How I tested

<!-- Concrete commands, behaviors verified, edge cases covered.
     "Manually tested in the browser" is fine for UI changes; back it up with a screenshot. -->

- [ ] Added or updated tests
- [ ] Ran `npm test` (and the new tests pass)
- [ ] Ran `npm run lint`
- [ ] Ran `npm run build:web-ui` (only if web-ui changed)

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything you're unsure about? Tradeoffs you want a second opinion on?
     Things that are intentionally out of scope?
     Delete this section if there's nothing to flag. -->
